_meta.purpose: Sanitized, synthetic resilience fixture for the /resilience route. Used as offline fallback and for fixture-driven rendering tests. No real domains, tokens, headers, IPs, provider responses, or destructive controls. Replace by running fleet-ops/scripts/cloudflare-resilience-audit.mjs.

findings.evidence: Canonical domain probe failed with status 521.
findings.next_action: Restore DNS/deployment or retire the surface in the manifest.

findings.evidence: Workflow appears to create a persistent preview/PR Worker without teardown.
findings.next_action: Use Pages previews or add an explicit closed-PR teardown job.

findings.evidence: Queue/workflow path has no visible idempotency/deduplication evidence.
findings.next_action: Add a stable job key or durable deduplication; test replay behavior.

findings.evidence: Deployment workflow has no visible post-deploy smoke/health check.
findings.next_action: Add a bounded failing smoke check for the canonical surface.

findings.evidence: Worker config has no observability block.
findings.next_action: Enable Workers Logs with an intentional sampling rate.

findings.evidence: Scheduled work has no visible timeout or batch bound.
findings.next_action: Add a bounded timeout/input batch and document max work per invocation.

findings.evidence: Project is parked but still listed in the live inventory.
findings.next_action: Confirm retirement or move back into an active tier.
